stemHtml: ATC: "Fastair 345, cross runway 28L, taxi to holding point B2, hold short of runway 28R." Correct readback?

options.a: Cross runway 28L, taxi to holding point B2, hold short of runway 28R, Fastair 345.
options.b: Cross runway 28L to hold short 28R, Fastair 345.
options.c: Fastair 345, taxi to holding point B2.
options.d: Taxi to holding point runway 28R, Fastair 345.
